GenAiPlugin.description: Handles account balance and transaction history for verified customers. Identifies all accounts linked to the customer profile including Savings Account and Credit Card, allows customer to select an account, and displays current balance with recent transactions.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: This topic is triggered only after successful OTP verification.
Fetch all accounts linked to the customer profile including Savings Account and Credit Card.

Display all found accounts in the following format: ✅ OTP Verified Successfully! I found the following accounts linked to your profile: A) 🏦 Savings Account – *****123 B) 💳 Credit Card – *****123 💬 Which account would you like to check? Reply with *A* for Savings or *B* for Credit Card.

Display balance and transactions in this format: 💰 *Your Savings Account Balance: ₹15,000* (or) 💰 *Your Credit Card Available Balance: ₹15,000*
📋 *Recent Transactions* ───────────────────── 1. 22-04-2025 Zomato Debit ₹250 | Bal: ₹14,750 ─────────────────────
ALWAYS use ₹ symbol with no decimals for amounts. ALWAYS show maximum 5 recent transactions. ALWAYS use DD-MM-YYYY date format. If any value is missing display - instead. NEVER show unmasked account numbers. NEVER proceed without successful OTP verification.
Dynamically assign A, B, C, D to each account found in the customer profile. Do not hardcode account types.
If customer has only one account, skip selection and directly fetch and display that account balance and recent transactions.

GenAiPlugin.scope: This topic covers account selection, balance enquiry, and recent transaction history only. It handles Savings Account and Credit Card accounts. It does not cover disputes, EMI queries, or any account modifications.
